metadata.title: Khyaal Engineering Pulse
metadata.description: Live engineering pulse for Khyaal's Core Platform Engineering workspace — a single source of truth for epics, OKRs, sprints, releases, and team velocity across Platform, Pulse Analytics, and DevOps. Serves PM, Dev, and Exec personas.
metadata.vision: Become the most trusted platform for active aging in India — delivering exceptional digital experiences that help seniors live richer, more connected lives through technology, community, and personalized service.

epics.name: Platform Modernization & Launch
epics.objective: Migrate 29 legacy pages to the new stack, achieve 95% VAPT security compliance, and launch the ₹99 subscription tier — establishing a stable, revenue-generating platform foundation for Q2 growth
epics.scope: Website migration (29 pages), ₹99 subscription launch, VAPT security hardening, 50Above50 improvements, CRM integration, API enhancements
epics.keyDeliverables: 29 pages migrated to new stack, ₹99 subscription live and processing payments, VAPT compliance >92%, app-code authentication shipped
epics.successMetrics: Page speed improvement 40%, revenue growth, security compliance 95%+

epics.name: Analytics & AI Intelligence
epics.objective: Build a data-driven decision layer with AI-powered sales agents, CDP dashboards, and personalised recommendations to accelerate Khyaal's membership conversion and community engagement
epics.scope: CDP development, Gold Tier analytics dashboards, AI Sales Agent pilot, ML personalisation engine, recommendation system
epics.keyDeliverables: Gold Tier analytics dashboards live, AI Sales Agent at 12%+ conversion, ML recommendation engine at 72% accuracy
epics.successMetrics: Data-driven decisions in 80%+ of campaigns, AI Sales Agent conversion >15%, recommendation accuracy >85%+

epics.name: Infrastructure Optimization & SRE
epics.objective: Reduce cloud infrastructure costs by 30%, sustain 99.9% uptime, and achieve sub-1-hour security incident response — laying the SRE foundation for Khyaal's next scale phase
epics.scope: Cloud cost optimization (AWS rightsizing + GCP evaluation), monitoring and alerting setup, security compliance and incident response
epics.keyDeliverables: 30% cost reduction vs baseline, 99.95% uptime achieved, security incident response time <1 hour
epics.successMetrics: Infrastructure cost savings ≥30%, system uptime ≥99.9%, security incident response <1hr

epics.name: Community Bug Resolution
epics.objective: Fortify platform integrity by eliminating all P0/P1 regressions in Sprint-6 — resolving Digi-gold payment failures, KCMC copy errors, and KYC blockers — to restore user trust and unblock critical revenue flows
epics.scope: Digi-gold SIP/one-time payment bugs, KCMC card delivery logic, buy-membership UPI/OTP UX, renewal CRON fix, Full KYC restoration (broken since Oct 2025), VAPT security remediation
epics.keyDeliverables: Zero active P0 bugs in production by Apr 25, 100% functional KYC flow, VAPT security sign-off
epics.successMetrics: Digi-gold payment success rate >99.5%, P0 bug count = 0, Support ticket volume (Payments/KYC) -40%

epics.name: 50 Above 50 Platform Maturity
epics.objective: Fix all 7 critical 50A50 issues (pricing display glitches, category data corruption, dashboard disappearance) and ship app-only entry upload — stabilising the contestant experience and driving app downloads
epics.scope: 50A50 CRM category-₹500 bug, extra-categories ghost data, pricing randomness, dashboard disappearance & persistence, submit redirect bug, upload format guidance, app-only entry upload API
epics.keyDeliverables: All 7 critical 50A50 issues resolved by Apr 25, app-only upload API live by May 9, contestant data cleaned via data script
epics.successMetrics: 50A50 open critical issue count = 0, upload flow completion rate >80%, zero contestant data anomalies post-sprint

epics.name: Product Growth Features
epics.objective: Scale Membership Acquisition: ship ₹99 plan prominence, Offline Events API infrastructure, and 50A50 app-only submission logic to force high-value mobile installs and conversion
epics.scope: ₹99 plan homepage placement, Offline Events server-side API (QR ticketing support), 50A50 app-only upload enforcement, Voice of Kalinga landing pages, Assistant Bot v2.0.1 intelligence upgrade
epics.keyDeliverables: ₹99 plan live on homepage, Offline Events API (Sprint-7 ready), 50A50 App-only entry submission live
epics.successMetrics: New membership conversions +15%, Mobile app downloads +20%, Event registration completion rate +25%

epics.name: CMS & Platform Capabilities
epics.objective: Deliver operator experience wins: reduce member lookup from 4 screens to 1, launch role-based access for ops, ship the insurance product landing page, and execute the Parents Day Jun 1 campaign — reducing daily ops friction and enabling seasonal growth
epics.scope: CMS membership details page (single profile view), Event Manager + Support individual roles, manual cache clear, events CMS improvements (start time column, mandatory link, image upload), insurance landing page, Parents Day campaign, Pulse Membership Dashboard
epics.keyDeliverables: Membership details page live (ops time <30s per inquiry), 2 roles provisioned (Event Manager, Support), cache clear in CMS, insurance landing live, Parents Day campaign ready by May 23 for Jun 1 launch
epics.successMetrics: Member lookup time: 2 min → <30 sec, 2 roles operational by May 9, Parents Day campaign executes on Jun 1 without engineering dependency

okrs.objective: Modernize platform infrastructure and achieve security excellence

keyResults.description: Migrate 100% of legacy pages to new platform
Launch $99 subscription tier with payment processing

okrs.objective: Build data-driven decision foundation with AI capabilities

keyResults.description: AI Sales Agent achieving 15%+ conversion rate

okrs.objective: Reduce infrastructure costs and improve reliability
Operational Excellence: fortify platform integrity by eliminating critical regressions and optimizing high-friction operator workflows by 75%

keyResults.description: Zero active P0 bugs (Digi-gold, KCMC, and Membership flow stability) in production by April 25
50A50 Platform Maturity: eliminate pricing anomalies and force app-only entry submission
Reduce operator member-lookup time from 2 min to <30 sec via consolidated CMS profile view

okrs.objective: Revenue Acceleration: drive conversion and acquisition through high-visibility pricing plans and community event infrastructure

keyResults.description: Achieve 15% lift in membership conversion through ₹99 plan prominence on homepage
Deploy Offline Events server API to enable Sprint-7 mobile event discovery and QR ticketing
Increase mobile app acquisition by 20% through 50A50 app-only entry channel

okrs.objective: Precision Personalization: leverage behavioral analytics to drive community retention and AI-assisted conversion lift

keyResults.description: Launch Pulse Membership Analytics Dashboard with 90-day cohort tracking
Scale AI Sales Agent conversion rate to 15%+ sustainable average
Achieve 85%+ accuracy in personalization engine for community event recommendations

sprints.name: Foundation Sprint
sprints.goal: Establish platform foundation and security baseline

sprints.name: Migration Sprint
sprints.goal: Complete legacy page migration and launch subscription

sprints.name: Security & AI Sprint
sprints.goal: Complete security hardening, VAPT remediation, and initiate AI Sales Agent development

sprints.name: Enhancement Sprint
sprints.goal: Complete security compliance and launch analytics capabilities

sprints.name: Integration Sprint
sprints.goal: Ship personalization engine, recommendation features, and complete Pulse Gold Tier analytics launch

sprints.name: Community Bug Fix Sprint
sprints.goal: Resolve all critical community bugs, fix 50A50 issues, ship ₹99 plan on homepage, complete Badminton landing page

sprints.name: Feature Delivery Sprint
sprints.goal: Ship Offline Events server API, Voice of Kalinga landing page, 50A50 app upload server side, CMS membership details page

sprints.name: Growth & Campaign Sprint
sprints.goal: Parents Day campaign, Insurance landing page, Pulse Membership Dashboard, Cached Categories Re-Migration

releases.name: v2.1 Platform Foundation
releases.features: Migration of 29 legacy pages, Launch of ₹99 'Lite' subscription tier, Core security baseline established
releases.successCriteria: 100% page migration with average 30% latency reduction; subscription engine successfully processing live revenue
releases.impact: Established a high-performance, revenue-ready foundation. Reduced technical debt by 60% and enabled rapid Q2 feature experimentation.

releases.name: v2.2 Security Hardening
releases.features: VAPT remediation (95%+ compliance), Automated security monitoring (Grafana), Crypto-transfer redirect resolution
releases.successCriteria: Zero critical VAPT findings remaining; real-time security alerting operational for all P0 flows
releases.impact: Secured the platform for institutional scale. Achieved enterprise-grade compliance, significantly boosting senior user and partner trust.

releases.name: v3.0 Analytics Intelligence
releases.features: Gold Tier behavioral dashboards, AI Sales Agent (Pilot v1), Core CDP data-layer integration
releases.successCriteria: Bi-directional data flow between CRM and CDP; AI agent pilot achieving 10%+ conversion baseline
releases.impact: Unlocked data-driven agility. Provided real-time visibility into senior engagement cohorts, enabling targeted marketing ROI at scale.

releases.name: v3.1 Personalization Engine
releases.features: Recommendation engines, template-based events, app-code authentication
releases.successCriteria: Recommendation accuracy 85%+, event templates deployed, authentication working
releases.impact: Personalized user experience, scalable event management, seamless authentication

releases.name: v3.2 Community Fix
releases.features: Critical bugs (Digi-gold SIP/one-time, KCMC card copy, buy membership UX/OTP), ₹99 plan on homepage, 50A50 category/pricing/dashboard fixes, CMS improvements (cache clear, tambola ticket, events CMS)
releases.successCriteria: Zero P0 bugs in production, all community-reported critical issues resolved
releases.impact: Restored user trust, unblocked revenue flows, stabilized 50A50 platform

releases.name: v4.0 Feature Release
releases.features: Offline Events server API, Voice of Kalinga landing page, 50A50 app-only upload server, CMS membership details page, Individual roles (Event Manager, Support)
releases.successCriteria: Offline Events API live, 50A50 app upload functional, CMS membership page reduces workflow to 1 click
releases.impact: Increased app downloads, expanded platform capabilities, reduced ops friction

items.note: Implementing Google reCAPTCHA v3 on all user-facing forms to prevent bot submissions and spam.
items.usecase: Reduces spam form submissions by 95%+ and protects platform from automated attacks.
acceptanceCriteria: reCAPTCHA v3 integrated on all forms
Score threshold configured appropriately
Fallback to v2 for low scores
Form submission analytics tracking spam reduction

items.note: Created a dedicated page for the event.
items.usecase: Helps users register and access event details easily.
acceptanceCriteria: Event page is live
Registration form works
Event details are accurate

items.note: Implementing comprehensive event tracking instrumentation across all user touchpoints (page views, clicks, form submissions, navigation events) to capture complete user journey data in Pulse analytics platform.
items.usecase: Enables complete funnel analysis and user journey visualization, reducing blind spots in analytics by 100% and improving conversion optimization capabilities by 40%.
acceptanceCriteria: All critical user events tracked (pageview, click, submit, navigate)
Events appear in Pulse dashboard within 30 seconds
Zero data loss - event buffering and retry logic implemented
Event schema validated and documented

items.note: Building automated notification system to track legacy page migration progress with Slack alerts on completion milestones and automated weekly progress reports showing pages migrated, performance improvements, and remaining work.
items.usecase: Reduces manual status update effort by 80%, improves stakeholder visibility, and ensures migration momentum through proactive reporting.
acceptanceCriteria: Slack alerts trigger on migration milestones (25%, 50%, 75%, 100%)
Weekly automated reports generated with migration metrics
Alert delivery reliability >99%
Stakeholder distribution list configurable

items.note: Building headless CMS component library with reusable content blocks (Hero, Feature Grid, Testimonials, CTA, Event Listing) using drag-and-drop interface powered by React Beautiful DnD, enabling marketing team to compose pages without engineering involvement.
items.usecase: Reduces page creation time from 2 days to 2 hours (90% reduction), eliminates engineering bottleneck for marketing campaigns, and improves content iteration velocity by 10x.
acceptanceCriteria: Minimum 5 production-ready blocks (Hero, Features, Testimonials, CTA, Events)
Drag-and-drop builder with live preview functional
Content team trained and can create pages independently
Block library documented with usage examples

items.note: Systematically remediating all critical and high-priority vulnerabilities identified in Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing (VAPT) report including SQL injection risks, XSS vulnerabilities, insecure authentication, missing security headers, and sensitive data exposure.
items.usecase: Achieves 95%+ security compliance target, eliminates critical attack vectors, protects user data, and meets regulatory requirements for secure platform operations.
acceptanceCriteria: All 12 critical VAPT findings resolved and verified
All 18 high-priority issues addressed
Re-scan passes with <5 medium findings
Security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options) implemented

items.note: Implementing secure redirect whitelist validation to prevent open redirect vulnerabilities, adding cryptographic signature verification for redirect URLs, and implementing referrer policy headers to protect against phishing and malicious redirect attacks identified in VAPT audit.
items.usecase: Eliminates open redirect vulnerability (OWASP Top 10), prevents phishing attacks using platform domain as trusted intermediary, and protects users from crypto-related scams leveraging redirect weaknesses.
acceptanceCriteria: Whitelist-based redirect validation enforced for all redirects
HMAC signature verification implemented for dynamic redirects
Malicious redirect attempts logged and blocked
All legitimate user flows tested and working (payment callbacks, OAuth, etc.)

items.note: Building flexible event page template system with pre-designed layouts (Conference, Workshop, Tour, Community Gathering) using parameterized components for rapid event page creation. Templates include registration forms, schedule widgets, speaker profiles, and venue maps with schema.org structured data for SEO.
items.usecase: Reduces event page creation time from 8 hours to <1 hour (87% reduction), ensures consistent UX across all events, improves SEO with structured data, and enables marketing team to launch events independently.
acceptanceCriteria: Minimum 3 event templates deployed (Conference, Workshop, Tour)
Template variables documented (title, date, location, speakers, schedule)
Marketing team can create event page in <1 hour without dev support
All templates include schema.org Event markup for rich snippets

items.text: Legacy page refresh – 29 pages migrated and modernized
items.note: Migrated 29 legacy pages to new platform with modern responsive design, optimized assets, and improved UX patterns.
items.usecase: Improves page speed by 40%, enhances usability, and provides better mobile experience for senior users.
acceptanceCriteria: All 29 pages migrated with responsive design
Page load time improved by 40% minimum
SEO scores above 90 for all pages
Zero critical accessibility issues

items.note: Launched premium subscription tier with Razorpay integration, user dashboard, and automated billing cycles.
items.usecase: Supports recurring revenue model and provides premium features to engaged users.
acceptanceCriteria: Razorpay payment gateway integrated and tested
Subscription dashboard with active status
Automated renewal and cancellation flows
Email notifications for payment events

items.note: Created dedicated event landing page with registration form, countdown timer, and event details.
items.usecase: Helps users register easily and access all event information in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: Event page published with registration form
Countdown timer showing days to event
Responsive design for mobile users
Integration with CRM for lead capture

items.text: Emailer templates for Travel and Axis Max
items.note: Built reusable, responsive email templates for marketing campaigns with dynamic content blocks.
items.usecase: Speeds up campaign launches and ensures brand consistency across all email communications.
acceptanceCriteria: Two templates created (Travel and Axis Max)
Mobile-responsive design tested
Dynamic content placeholders working
Tested across major email clients

items.note: Improved chatbot interface with better visual design, loading states, and error handling.
items.usecase: Makes customer support interaction smoother and more intuitive for senior users.
acceptanceCriteria: UI redesign with larger touch targets
Loading states and animations added
Error messages user-friendly
Tested on mobile and desktop

items.note: Integrated Pulse analytics SDK to track user behavior, page views, and conversion events across the website.
items.usecase: Provides comprehensive analytics for data-driven decision making and user journey optimization.
acceptanceCriteria: Pulse SDK integrated on all website pages
Key events tracking verified (pageview, signup, purchase)
User sessions properly tracked
Data flowing to Pulse dashboard

items.note: Conducted root cause analysis for incorrect website redirect to crypto domain. Issue identified in DNS configuration and server routing rules.
items.usecase: Prevents users from being redirected to wrong domains, ensuring brand trust and security.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause documented with evidence
DNS configuration reviewed
Server routing rules analyzed
Fix recommendations documented

items.note: Kicked off comprehensive Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing (VAPT) with Appknox security platform for entire web application.
items.usecase: Identifies and mitigates security vulnerabilities early to ensure platform safety and regulatory compliance.
acceptanceCriteria: VAPT scope defined and approved
Appknox platform access configured
Initial scan completed
Vulnerability report received

items.note: Creating dedicated event landing page for Rajkot event with localized content, registration form, and venue information.
items.usecase: Helps users in Rajkot region register easily and access event-specific information.
acceptanceCriteria: Event page published with Gujarati language support option
Registration form with Rajkot venue details
Google Maps integration for venue location
Mobile responsive design

items.text: Events listing and joining via Web Zoom SDK
items.note: Allow users to join Zoom events directly from the website without OTP login. Authentication via secure app-generated code or QR code scan with JWT token generation.
items.usecase: Enables seamless event joining from website, reducing friction and improving attendance rates by 30%.
acceptanceCriteria: Zoom Web SDK integrated on event pages
QR code/app code authentication working
JWT token generation and validation secure
Event join flow tested end-to-end

items.text: Khyaal Badminton Championship (Kannur) landing page + comms
items.note: Landing page and communications setup for Khyaal Badminton Championship in Kannur.
items.usecase: Drives registrations and app downloads for the event; surfaces Khyaal brand.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page live with event details
Registration form functional
Communication emails/notifications configured

items.note: Critical Revenue Driver: Surface ₹99/month 'Lite' plan prominently on the homepage to lower the entry barrier for new seniors.
items.usecase: Increases homepage-to-checkout conversion by 15% by offering a low-commitment entry point for community exploration.
acceptanceCriteria: ₹99 plan card displayed in the 'Top-of-Fold' section (within first 800px)
CTA correctly routes to the /buy-membership checkout with 'Lite' plan pre-selected
Mobile responsiveness: Card must be fully readable on 360px width devices
Billing frequency clearly explicitly stated as 'Monthly Subscription'

items.text: Buy membership popup — mobile number entry UX broken
items.note: Blocking Regression: Mobile number input field is not consistently capturing digits on virtual keyboards and Safari/iOS. Impact: users cannot initiate OTP.
items.usecase: Unblocks the primary revenue entry point; restorations will stabilize daily membership growth.
acceptanceCriteria: Input field accepts only 10-digit numeric values
Keyboard type set to 'tel' for optimal mobile numeric entry
Native browser 'autofill' correctly populates the mobile field on iOS/Android
Primary CTA 'Send OTP' enabled only after 10 valid digits are present

items.text: Buy membership popup — multiple OTPs triggered on multiple taps
items.note: UX Stability: Multiple taps on 'Resend/Send' OTP trigger concurrent API calls, leading to out-of-sync credential verification.
items.usecase: Optimizes API usage and prevents 'Invalid OTP' errors caused by credential collision.
acceptanceCriteria: Button enters 'Loading/Disabled' state immediately upon first tap
60-second countdown timer mandatory before 'Resend' option reappears
Backend API response must return '429 Too Many Requests' if concurrent calls hit internal limits
UI displays 'OTP Sent Successfully' toast on successful trigger

items.text: Pending migration from old website — complete remaining pages
items.note: Remaining pages from the old website still need to be migrated to the new platform. Dev work through Apr 6.
items.usecase: Completes platform modernization; removes legacy hosting dependency.
acceptanceCriteria: All remaining pages migrated
No broken links
Performance parity with existing migrated pages

items.note: Security Hardening: Implement reCAPTCHA Enterprise on 50A50 forms to mitigate high-volume bot submissions observed in previous campaigns.
items.usecase: Ensures lead quality for 50A50 contestants while maintaining the zero-friction 'invisible' UX for seniors.
acceptanceCriteria: Invisible reCAPTCHA implementation (no user challenge unless high risk)
Threshold of 0.7 set for legitimate user pass-through
Graceful degradation: system allows form submission if reCAPTCHA library fails to load
Telemetry added to track 'Bot-Blocked' vs 'Human-Passed' rates

items.text: Voice of Kalinga — landing page + communications setup
items.note: Landing page and communications setup for Voice of Kalinga event. Target: Apr 17.
items.usecase: Drives registrations for the event; promotes Khyaal brand in Kalinga region.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page live by Apr 17
Event details, dates, registration information complete
Communication flow configured

items.text: Online Events on Web — web-based online event support
items.note: Build web-based online events support so users can join live events from the browser.
items.usecase: Expands event access beyond app users; increases engagement.
acceptanceCriteria: Online events visible and joinable on web
Registration flow works
Live event link accessible post-registration

items.note: Implementing comprehensive event tracking for 50Above50 website covering user interactions (course views, certificate downloads, bundle purchases, category browsing, search queries) to enable complete attribution and funnel optimization in Pulse analytics.
items.usecase: Enables accurate campaign ROI measurement, identifies drop-off points in purchase funnel (expected 30% conversion improvement), and provides data foundation for personalized recommendations.
acceptanceCriteria: All user interaction events tracked (view, click, search, purchase)
Events appear in Pulse dashboard with <1 minute latency
Multi-step funnel analysis functional (browse → view → cart → purchase)
UTM parameters captured and attributed correctly

items.note: Addressing security vulnerabilities identified in VAPT assessment for 50Above50 platform including input validation gaps, session management weaknesses, and exposed admin endpoints. Lower priority than main platform due to limited PII and smaller attack surface.
items.usecase: Enhances security posture for 50Above50 platform, protects course content and user data, and maintains consistent security standards across all Khyaal properties.
acceptanceCriteria: All critical and high findings from VAPT report resolved
Input validation implemented on all user-facing forms
Admin endpoints properly secured with authentication
Security re-scan passes with acceptable risk level

items.note: Complete redesign of 50Above50 homepage with modern UI, improved visual hierarchy, and senior-friendly accessibility features.
items.usecase: Creates stronger first impression and improves user engagement by 25%, resulting in higher event registrations.
acceptanceCriteria: New design implemented with larger fonts and touch targets
Hero section highlights upcoming events prominently
Mobile-responsive design tested on common devices
Page load time under 2 seconds

items.note: Simplified category information pages with clearer descriptions, visual enhancements, and improved navigation for 50 categories.
items.usecase: Helps users understand 50Above50 program categories 40% faster, leading to better category selection and participation.
acceptanceCriteria: All 50 category pages updated with new design
Category descriptions simplified for senior audience
Visual icons added for quick category identification
Related categories recommendation section added

items.note: Enabled self-service certificate download portal for participants who completed 50Above50 categories, with secure authentication.
items.usecase: Reduces support requests by 60% and provides instant certificate access to returning participants.
acceptanceCriteria: Download portal accessible from user dashboard
Certificates generated with user name and category
Authentication via user login verified
PDF format optimized for printing and sharing

items.note: Created bundled offer combining 50Above50 2026 registration with app membership at discounted price point.
items.usecase: Encourages membership sign-ups with 30% bundle discount, driving recurring revenue and user retention.
acceptanceCriteria: Bundle offer page created with clear pricing
Payment processing for bundle working
Bundle automatically applies both registration and membership
Confirmation email includes both activations

items.note: Implemented coin-based redemption system allowing users to unlock 50Above50 categories using earned reward coins.
items.usecase: Increases platform engagement by 40% and provides gamification incentive for continued participation.
acceptanceCriteria: Coin redemption flow working on category pages
Coin balance updated in real-time after redemption
Category access granted immediately after redemption
Redemption history tracked in user profile

items.note: Refined category structure by merging overlapping categories, updating descriptions, and adding new categories while maintaining exactly 50 total. Migrated all existing user data to align with new structure.
items.usecase: Ensures consistent, optimized category framework for better content organization, user navigation, and program clarity.
acceptanceCriteria: Category count maintained at exactly 50
All user data migrated without loss
Category mappings documented
New structure tested with sample users

items.note: Connected 50Above50 website lead forms to Zoho CRM for automated lead capture and nurturing workflows.
items.usecase: Improves lead tracking efficiency by 70% and enables automated follow-up campaigns for registrations.
acceptanceCriteria: All lead forms connected to Zoho API
Lead data synced in real-time to CRM
Custom fields mapped correctly
Lead source tagged as 50Above50

items.note: Integrated Pulse analytics SDK to track user behavior, category views, registrations, and engagement patterns across 50Above50 website.
items.usecase: Provides comprehensive analytics showing how users interact with categories, enabling data-driven program optimization.
acceptanceCriteria: Pulse SDK integrated on all pages
Key events tracked (category view, registration, certificate download)
User sessions tracked properly
Data flowing to Pulse analytics dashboard

items.note: Initiated comprehensive security review for 50Above50 website including vulnerability scanning and security best practices assessment.
items.usecase: Identifies potential security issues early, ensuring participant data protection and platform trustworthiness.
acceptanceCriteria: Security review scope defined
Initial vulnerability scan completed
Security findings documented
Remediation priorities established

items.note: Planning seamless transition from website to mobile app for 50Above50 participants, including deep linking and context preservation.
items.usecase: Provides smoother cross-platform experience, reducing friction and improving app adoption by 35%.
acceptanceCriteria: Deep linking implemented for all category pages
User context preserved during transition
App install prompts optimized
A/B testing shows improved app adoption

items.note: New registration page shows ₹500 instead of ₹999 due to a cache issue.
items.usecase: Fixes incorrect pricing display that confuses new registrants.
acceptanceCriteria: New registration always shows ₹999
Cache cleared for affected pages
No price mismatch between display and checkout

items.note: Dashboard button vanishes after token/cookie expiry. Check Token/Cookie TTL and contest caching.
items.usecase: Ensures users can always access their dashboard without hard-refreshing.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard button remains visible throughout session
Token refresh handled gracefully
No UI disappearance on TTL expiry

items.text: 50A50 submit entry redirects to home page instead of confirmation
items.note: Clicking Submit Entry redirects user back to home page. Likely token/cookie TTL or contest caching issue.
items.usecase: Users lose submission progress; fixing this prevents data loss and user frustration.
acceptanceCriteria: Submit Entry leads to confirmation screen
Entry saved correctly before redirect
No unexpected redirect to home page

items.text: 50A50 dashboard button not persistent in website top bar
items.note: Dashboard button should be visible throughout the website top bar for all logged-in users.
items.usecase: Improves navigation and reduces friction for returning contestants.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard button visible in top bar on all pages for logged-in users
Button persists through page navigation

items.text: 50A50 upload entry flow — show submission format before uploading
items.note: Change upload flow so user sees required submission format/template before uploading their entry.
items.usecase: Reduces invalid submissions; improves first-time submission success rate.
acceptanceCriteria: Submission format/guidelines shown before upload prompt
User acknowledges format before proceeding
Upload step comes after format review

items.note: Server-side API to support app-only entry submission for 50A50. Mobile UI handled in Khyaal Mobile workspace.
items.usecase: Enforces app-only upload policy to drive app downloads.
acceptanceCriteria: API endpoint accepts entry uploads from authenticated app users
Web upload disabled after feature ships
App upload validated correctly (file type, size, category)

items.note: Enhancing the speed and reliability of CRM data synchronization during migration.
items.usecase: Ensures CRM data is accurate, up-to-date, and reliable for reporting and decision-making.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration completes successfully
Data integrity is maintained
Sync performance improved by 50%
items.blockerNote: Waiting on Zoho customer support response

items.note: Built comprehensive backend system for coin-based rewards with transaction tracking, balance management, and redemption history.
items.usecase: Enables users to redeem 50Above50 categories using earned coins, driving engagement and platform stickiness.
acceptanceCriteria: Coin balance API endpoints working
Redemption transaction logging implemented
Real-time balance updates verified
Redemption history queryable from CRM

items.note: Developed bidirectional connector between 50Above50 CRM and Zoho CRM for automated data synchronization of leads, contacts, and activities.
items.usecase: Keeps lead records updated in real-time, enabling marketing automation and reducing manual data entry by 80%.
acceptanceCriteria: Bidirectional sync working for leads and contacts
Custom field mappings configured
Sync conflicts handled with priority rules
Sync logs available for troubleshooting

items.text: 50A50 category change asks ₹500 — category edit button missing
items.note: Changing category in the dashboard triggers a ₹500 charge. Category edit button needs to be added separately from the payment flow.
items.usecase: Allows contestants to correct category errors without being incorrectly charged.
acceptanceCriteria: Category edit button added to dashboard
Category change does not trigger payment
Category change saved correctly in CRM

items.text: 50A50 extra unchecked categories re-appear after manual dashboard entry
items.note: Unchecked categories re-appear after manual entry. Fix involves data script to remove impacted users and fixing pre-selected category display logic.
items.usecase: Ensures category list is clean and accurate; prevents duplicate/ghost category entries.
acceptanceCriteria: Impacted users cleaned up via data script
Pre-selected categories not duplicated on manual entry
Category display accurate after save

items.text: 50A50 fresh user back-to-back entries showing ₹500 and ₹999 randomly
items.note: Fresh users making back-to-back contest entries randomly see ₹500 and ₹999. Pricing logic must be consistent.
items.usecase: Ensures consistent and correct pricing for all users.
acceptanceCriteria: First entry always ₹999
Subsequent entries follow correct pricing rules
No random price flip between ₹500 and ₹999

items.text: 50A50 partially completed status stuck when deleting pending entry
items.note: Deleting a pending entry from the partially-completed list does not update the user status correctly.
items.usecase: Accurate status tracking ensures users can re-enter without being stuck in a limbo state.
acceptanceCriteria: Deleting pending entry updates status from partially-completed to open/eligible
Status update reflected immediately in dashboard
No orphaned entries in CRM

items.note: Add filter capability to the submission export feature — filter by category, status, or date range.
items.usecase: Reduces manual data filtering work for operations team.
acceptanceCriteria: Export filtered by category
Export filtered by submission status
Export filtered by date range

items.note: Enhanced admin controls for Tambola game management including board generation, winner verification, and prize management features.
items.usecase: Makes Tambola event management 50% faster and reduces manual errors during game execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Automated board generation working
Winner verification system functional
Prize management interface simplified
Game history logs accessible

items.note: Simplified event creation and editing workflow with improved form validation, auto-save functionality, and streamlined UI.
items.usecase: Speeds up event setup by 60%, reducing admin time from 15 minutes to 6 minutes per event.
acceptanceCriteria: Form validation with clear error messages

items.note: Upgrading AI assistant with improved LLM model, better context handling, memory persistence, and enhanced response quality using RAG architecture.
items.usecase: Provides smarter, more contextual assistance with 50% better response relevance to enhance user engagement and support quality.
acceptanceCriteria: New LLM model integrated and tested
Context window expanded for longer conversations
Memory persistence working across sessions
Response quality improved (measured by user ratings)

items.note: Engineering 50+ Gold Tier analytical features from raw event data including behavioral aggregations (30-day activity scores, event participation rates), engagement metrics (session duration, interaction depth), temporal patterns (weekly activity cycles, preferred time slots), and derived attributes (user lifecycle stage, churn risk indicators) using Spark/pandas for batch processing.
items.usecase: Transforms raw event streams into actionable business intelligence enabling segmentation accuracy improvement of 60%, predictive model performance boost of 45% (AUC score), and unlocks advanced analytics dashboards showing behavioral cohorts, engagement trends, and retention drivers.
acceptanceCriteria: Minimum 50 features engineered covering behavioral, temporal, and engagement dimensions
Feature documentation includes business definition, calculation logic, and usage examples
Data quality validation shows <5% null values and logical consistency checks pass
Features materialized in Gold Tier tables with daily refresh schedule

items.note: Designing normalized dimensional data models for Gold Tier analytics layer using Kimball methodology - implementing fact tables for user events/sessions, dimension tables for users/content/time, and slowly changing dimensions (SCD Type 2) for tracking attribute history. Optimizing schema for analytical query performance with partitioning and indexing strategies.
items.usecase: Provides structured, query-optimized data foundation enabling 10x faster analytics queries (vs Bronze/Silver layers), supports complex joins and aggregations for BI dashboards, ensures data lineage and auditability, and establishes scalable schema for future analytics expansion.
acceptanceCriteria: Star schema implemented with fact and dimension tables documented
Schema documentation includes entity relationships and cardinality
Data migration scripts tested for Bronze/Silver → Gold transformation
Query performance benchmarks show 10x improvement over raw data

items.note: Defining and implementing 20+ business-critical metrics for Gold Tier including engagement KPIs (DAU/MAU, session duration, feature adoption), conversion metrics (funnel completion rates, revenue per user), retention indicators (cohort retention curves, churn probability), and operational metrics (data freshness, pipeline health) with automated quality monitoring.
items.usecase: Establishes single source of truth for business metrics eliminating conflicting numbers (current 40% variance), enables real-time business health monitoring, provides automated alerting for anomalies (>20% deviation), and supports data-driven decision making across all teams.
acceptanceCriteria: Minimum 20 business metrics defined with clear calculation logic documented
Metrics accessible via dashboards with drill-down capabilities
Automated alerts configured for anomalies and threshold breaches
Metric validation shows <3% variance vs. source systems

items.note: Deploying Gold Tier analytics dashboards covering membership trends, event performance, revenue metrics, and engagement KPIs. Dashboards serve all three personas with persona-specific data density and are accessible in exec-view mode without requiring CMS credentials.
items.usecase: Makes data-driven insights easily accessible for teams to monitor performance and make informed decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Gold Tier analytics dashboard live with membership, event, and revenue KPIs
Real-time data updates with < 30s latency confirmed via load test
All 3 persona views (PM, Exec, Dev) render correct filtered data
Dashboard accessible in exec mode without CMS credentials

items.note: Engineering the ML feature set that powers the recommendation and personalization engines. Covers 50+ signals including user demographics, content affinity scores, event attendance history, engagement recency, and purchase patterns. Features are stored in a versioned feature store and refreshed on a scheduled pipeline to ensure model freshness.
items.usecase: Improves model accuracy and strength of recommendations.
acceptanceCriteria: 50+ features engineered covering user demographics, behavioral signals, event affinity, and engagement recency
Feature store populated and validated against 90-day historical data
Feature pipeline runs on scheduled refresh with < 5% data staleness
Baseline model accuracy established at ≥ 70% before persona engine integration

items.note: Technical Spike: Evaluate RAG performance vs. fine-tuning for senior-specific health queries. Goal: reduce hallucination rate in complex medical context to <2%.
items.usecase: Provides ultra-reliable, context-aware assistance for delicate health and community inquiries, driving trust and long-term retention.
acceptanceCriteria: Evaluation dataset (50 senior personas) created

Context-window optimization report delivered

items.note: Research Spike: Investigate safe evaluation of complex business logic within Journey flows using JEXL or similar expression languages.
items.usecase: Allows product teams to define high-granularity branching (e.g., 'if age > 75 AND last_event_city == Pune') without code changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Expression engine performance benchmarked

No-code interface mockup validated with ops team

items.note: Implementing comprehensive AWS cost optimization strategy including rightsizing EC2 instances based on utilization metrics, migrating infrequent access data to S3 Glacier, implementing auto-scaling policies, removing idle resources, and negotiating Reserved Instance commitments for baseline workloads to achieve 30% cost reduction without performance degradation.
items.usecase: Reduces monthly AWS spend by 30% ($15K → $10.5K savings/month, $180K annually) while maintaining 99.9% uptime, frees budget for innovation initiatives, establishes ongoing cost monitoring culture, and provides infrastructure cost transparency enabling better technical decision-making.
acceptanceCriteria: Monthly AWS bill reduced by 30% vs. baseline (tracked month-over-month)
Application performance metrics unchanged (p95 latency, error rates)
Cost monitoring dashboard deployed with resource-level attribution
Auto-scaling policies tested under load with documented behavior
